sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n39669" key="e)pikeleustiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπικελευ-στικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n39669.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">cheering on</tr_>: <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τὸ ἐ</foreign>. the <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">signal for attack</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1620.tlg001:5:16:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Polyaen.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.16.4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
